name: Path Equivalence: '\multiple\\internal\backslash'
description: The product does not properly handle paths containing multiple consecutive internal backslashes on Windows, which the OS normalizes to single backslashes, allowing attackers to bypass path-based access controls that match the multi-backslash form literally.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path with multiple consecutive internal backslashes that bypasses CONTROL[path_check] because the check doesn't normalize duplicate backslashes before comparison, while Windows resolves them equivalently at STORAGE[file_access]
